# Breculia AI

> Clay + Instantly outbound pipeline operator for US B2B founders. I build and run automated cold email systems that book meetings — without hiring SDRs or spending 6 weeks learning Clay yourself.

## Service

- **Setup ($1,500 one-time):** Clay waterfall enrichment table, Apollo + Hunter + Prospeo fallback, Instantly campaign with domain warmup, AI-personalized openers for 500 leads, 20-min Loom walkthrough. Live in 48 hours.
- **Managed ($1,000/month):** Weekly lead list refresh (500 new/week), copy updates, deliverability monitoring, A/B testing, monthly performance report. 30-Day Improvement Guarantee.
- **Growth ($2,500/month):** Everything in Managed + Top-500 ABM campaign, custom account research, CRM sync (HubSpot / Salesforce), LinkedIn + email combined, weekly 30-min strategy call.

## ICP Served

B2B SaaS, consulting, agencies, and coaching businesses · $500K–$5M ARR · 1–20 people · United States only · founders who feel the pain of manual outbound or a stalled pipeline.

## Tool Stack

Clay · Instantly · Apollo.io · Hunter.io · Prospeo · Smartlead · Xflow · Airtable · Google Calendar · Notion

## Results

- 61% average open rate (industry avg 28%)
- 4.2% reply rate (industry avg 1%)
- 18 meetings booked in Month 1 from 1,847 emails
